{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Dreadgod inheritance
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|When a [[Dreadgod]] beast dies, the others inherit its power until it is reborn.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
